chapter_title.en: On Those Who Omit Wudu or Part of it, or Doubts in Its Completion

text: رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ مَسْحَ رَأْسِهِ قَالَ «فَلْيَمْسَحْ» قَالَ لَمْ يَذْكُرْهُ حَتَّى دَخَلَ فِي اَلصَّلاَةِ قَالَ «فَلْيَمْسَحْ رَأْسَهُ مِنْ بَلَلِ لِحْيَتِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.135 - Abu Basir narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) regarding a man who forgets to wipe his head during wudu.
Imam (as) said: "Then let him wipe it."
Abu Basir asked: "What if he does not remember until he has started the prayer?"
Imam (as) said: "Then let him wipe his head with the moisture from his beard”.
